name: @btsheehy/tikka
description: Minimal dependency-free functional programming utilities for TypeScript and JavaScript

scripts.perf: vitest bench test/perf/library-comparison.bench.ts test/perf/short-circuit.bench.ts test/perf/object-and-deep.bench.ts test/perf/pipe.bench.ts
scripts.perf:watch: vitest bench --watch test/perf/library-comparison.bench.ts test/perf/short-circuit.bench.ts test/perf/object-and-deep.bench.ts test/perf/pipe.bench.ts
scripts.perf:test: sh -c 'vitest bench test/perf/library-comparison.bench.ts test/perf/short-circuit.bench.ts test/perf/object-and-deep.bench.ts test/perf/pipe.bench.ts --testNamePattern "$1"' --
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build

author: Brandon Sheehy <dev@btsheehy.com>
